summary: Completed comprehensive testing of S1.3 Simulated Broker Adapter. Core broker functionality working correctly with SlippageFillModel, FeeCalculator, and position tracking. Strategy Runtime (T6) integration functional but has signal generation limitations.

integration_issues.issue: Only ENTER_LONG signals generated, no EXIT_LONG signals during simulation
integration_issues.impact: Positions accumulate without exits, affecting realistic trading simulation
integration_issues.details: Strategy requires existing position context to generate EXIT_LONG actions, but position detection in simulation context may be incomplete

integration_issues.issue: Manual signals not generating actions (0 actions for both ENTER_LONG and EXIT_LONG)
Closed orders not being tracked (0 closed orders despite 114 fills)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix strategy integration issues: 1) Ensure EXIT_LONG signals are generated when positions exist and BEARISH signals occur, 2) Fix manual signal processing to generate actions, 3) Improve position context detection in simulation environment. The core S1.3 broker functionality is working correctly.
